dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of the most important metrics and status.
dashboard.body: The dashboard gives you a starting point for top-level system health, usage summaries, and recent activity.

catalogs.title: Catalogs
catalogs.description: Browse and manage available catalogs for configuration.
catalogs.body: Use catalogs to review available entities, organize sources, and define reusable structures.

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.body: Parameters control system behavior and defaults across configured modules.

parameterCrud.description: Create, update, or remove parameter definitions.
parameterCrud.deleteWarning: This action removes the parameter definition. Please confirm before continuing.
parameterCrud.atLeastOneDomain: At least one domain must be selected

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Create and manage reusable configuration templates.
templates.body: Templates help standardize setup patterns and reduce repetitive configuration work.
templates.empty: No templates yet. Use the button above to create one.
templates.noSelection: Select a template from the tree to view or edit its details.
templates.deleteTemplateBody: Deleting this template will also remove all of its child templates. This action cannot be undone.
templates.deleteCategoryBody: Delete this category and all of its contents?
templates.deleteParameterBody: Remove this parameter from the category?
templates.noCategories: No categories yet. Add one to get started.

assetConfiguration.title: Asset Configuration
assetConfiguration.description: Configure asset behavior, metadata, and mappings.
assetConfiguration.body: Manage asset-specific rules and associations to ensure consistent configuration outcomes.
assetConfiguration.detailPlaceholder: Select an item in the tree to view details here.
assetConfiguration.tabConnectivityLead: Outbound connections and health for this selection (sample data).
assetConfiguration.tabParametersEmpty: This item has no child parameters. Choose a branch node in the tree to browse nested values here.
assetConfiguration.tabApplicationsLead: Application metadata associated with this asset (read-only sample).
assetConfiguration.tabDeploymentLead: Typical deployment checks for this configuration:
assetConfiguration.tabDeploymentItem1: Validate configuration against the target environment profile.
assetConfiguration.tabDeploymentItem2: Run automated regression tests on dependent services.
assetConfiguration.tabDeploymentItem3: Record rollout notes and rollback steps before promotion.

application.title: Application
application.description: Review application-level options and operational settings.

applicationModules.title: Application Modules
applicationModules.body: Manage module-level settings and module relationships.

modulesIntegration.title: Integration Module
modulesIntegration.body: Use this page to manage integration endpoints and module settings.

modulesReporting.title: Reporting Module
modulesReporting.body: Use this page to manage reporting behavior and outputs.

securityPermissions.title: Security Permissions
securityPermissions.description: Manage role permissions and access rules.
securityPermissions.body: Configure permission assignments and authorization rules here.

security.title: Security
security.description: Configure access policies and security-related settings.
security.body: Use this area to manage protections, permissions, and related governance controls.

user.title: User
user.description: Manage your profile and personal preferences.
user.body: Update your user information and review account settings from this section.

logOut.title: Log Out
logOut.description: Sign out from the current session.
logOut.body: You can implement sign-out flow here, such as token cleanup and redirect to an authentication page.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you were looking for does not exist.
notFound.body: Use the left navigation panel to return to a valid section.
